content.tier_path: tier 1 (curl static fetch) → 403 Cloudflare → logged to failures.log → user escalated → tier 3 (computer-use + Chrome read-tier + Claude vision)
content.outcome: Page rendered successfully in real Chrome; viewport captured via screenshot; vision read all visible content. No 'Just a moment...' challenge — Cloudflare did not block the user's actual browser session.
content.viewport_only_caveat: Read-tier Chrome via computer-use cannot scroll. Initial screenshot captured the above-the-fold viewport only (page header + breadcrumbs + pedal photo + price + CTA buttons + first-fold metadata). Below-fold content (description, FAQs, artist usage, owner insights, used-with, gear guides) requires the user to scroll the page; subsequent screenshots can capture each section.

content.description:
Hero photo of the Chase Bliss Audio Clean pedal, rendered on the Equipboard product page. Top-down view showing the pedal's full control layout. THREE ROWS OF KNOBS visible:

  Row 1 (top — 3 knobs): DYNAMICS (green, far-left), SENSITIVITY (RAMP) (green, center), WET (blue, far-right)
  Row 2 (3 knobs): ATTACK (green), EQ (green), DRY (blue)
  Row 3 (3 small knobs): RELEASE, MODE, PHYSICS

At bottom: 'clean' wordmark in multi-color block letters (lime/teal/red/yellow/orange — characteristic Chase Bliss design language). Below the wordmark: AUX (small knob), BYPASS (footswitch icon).

This is the pedal's actual front-panel control surface — content the user-pasted text version (tier 0) didn't include because the pasted version was DOM-text-only. Tier 3 visual capture surfaces the pedal's control labels directly from the product photo.

what_lower_tiers_missed: Tier 0 (user-paste of text) and tier 1 (static fetch — blocked) both miss this. The pedal photo IS on the page, but neither tier extracts the labels embedded IN the photo image. Tier 3's vision pipeline reads the photo natively. This is exactly the same value-add as spike 002c's frame analysis vs spike 002a's transcript-only.

content.block_label: Left thumbnail strip — gallery + media counts
